inputs.text: RAW photo, ultra realistic skin texture, stunning Korean idol woman on an urban rooftop at twilight, long straight black hair with dark face-framing highlights cascading over one shoulder, oval face with monolid eyes lined in smudged charcoal, mysterious and alluring expression with lips barely parted, flawless porcelain skin with natural texture, styled smoky makeup with gradient berry lips, wearing an oversized cream knit sweater slipping off one shoulder, shot on 35mm lens environmental portrait, Dutch angle tilted frame creating dramatic tension, off-center rule of thirds composition, ring light beauty lighting reflecting twin catchlights in her eyes mixed with golden twilight glow, city skyline blurred behind her, wind catching loose strands of hair, atmospheric haze, cinematic mood, no text, no watermarks
